description: Composition Blue, green, white and brown striped shirt made of cotton, that has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with tape detailing on the inseam, front buttoned placket with contrast facing panel, patch pocket on the upper left chest with embroidered brand name and curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this striped shirt from belmonte. The blue, green, white and brown stripes adds interest to the shirt, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with pants and leather shoes for a well groomed look. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
